raw_text:
78. Hybrid Manufacturing Engineer (Additive + Machining)

Job Summary  
Combines additive manufacturing and traditional machining processes to develop advanced 
tooling solutions.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Develop hybrid manufacturing strategies  
• Integrate 3D printing with CNC machining  
• Optimize processes for cost and efficiency  
• Improve tool performance and durability  
• Conduct trials and validations  
• Collaborate with cross -functional teams  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of both additive and machining processes  
• CNC and CAD/CAM expertise  
• Process optimization skills  
• Analytical thinkin g  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Production  
Experience  
• 4–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹50,000 – ₹1,10,000 per month
